definitions.text: Two or more people including or consisting of the speaker(s)/writer(s). Excluding the person(s) being addressed.
examples: We are here to arrest you.
We need to have a talk, you and me.
We are here to arrest you.

definitions.text: Designates the speaker(s)/writer(s) as belonging to or constituting the stated category of people.
examples: We Canadians like to think of ourselves as different.
We the undersigned wish to express our disapproval.
He was a propa gadgie, and always bought we drinks after a long shift.
And what have you done for we since? Nowt!
